hero.headline: Where Ideas Become Products
hero.subheadline: Cognitive0Creations is the creative studio behind the Luxe Ignite Style portfolio — building EBooks, apps, and digital experiences that move people.

about.headline: Crafted with Intention
about.body: We are the production arm of Luxe Ignite Style. Every product we build — from a 10-page EBook to a full mobile app — carries the same commitment to quality, warmth, and purpose. Cognitive0Creations is where the vision becomes real.

items.name: MindBloom
items.description: A cozy mental wellness app guided by Blaze, your AI fox companion. Courses, breathing, yoga, and daily check-ins.

items.name: Wellness EBook Series
items.description: A growing library of digital guides on mental health, mindfulness, and personal growth.

items.name: Creator Toolkit
items.description: Templates, frameworks, and resources for digital content creators building their own brands.

items.title: MindBloom Beta — Now Live!
items.description: MindBloom launched on Google Play at the end of June. Download free and meet Blaze.

items.title: Creator Workshop
items.description: Free online workshop — how we build digital products from concept to launch.
